exercises.header: We have a barbecue on the roof terrace.
The roof terrace has a beautiful view.
The garage is next to the house.
exercises.answer: Το γκαράζ είναι δίπλα στο σπίτι.

exercises.header: We park the car in the garage.
My parents' house has a big garden.
exercises.answer: Το σπίτι των γονιών μου έχει μεγάλο κήπο.

exercises.header: I want to live in a house near the sea.
exercises.answer: Θέλω να μένω σε ένα σπίτι κοντά στη θάλασσα.

exercises.header: The apartment is on the fifth floor.
exercises.answer: Το διαμέρισμα είναι στον πέμπτο όροφο.

exercises.header: I open the window every morning.
The door of the basement is always closed.
exercises.answer: Η πόρτα του υπογείου είναι πάντα κλειστή.

exercises.header: We eat breakfast on the balcony.
The two-story house has four bedrooms.
I rang the front door bell.
